allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''keys:'', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\(''first 2 pokemon:'', d[''pokemon''][:2]\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''generation:'', d.get\(''generation''\)\); print\(''is_baby:'', d.get\(''is_baby''\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); names=[p[''pokemon''][''name''] for p in d[''pokemon'']]; urls=[p[''pokemon''][''url''] for p in d[''pokemon''][:3]]; print\(''count:'', len\(names\)\); print\(''first 3:'', names[:3]\); print\(''sample urls:'', urls\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ids=[int\(p[''pokemon''][''url''].rstrip\(''/''\).split\(''/''\)[-1]\) for p in d[''pokemon'']]; big=[i for i in ids if i > 1025]; print\(''count:'', len\(ids\)\); print\(''IDs > 1025 \(alt forms\):'', len\(big\)\); print\(''sample big IDs:'', big[:5]\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''count:'', d[''count'']\); print\(''first 3:'', d[''results''][:3]\)")
